MEMORANDUM
TO: Engineering Leadership
FROM: Platform Team
DATE: March 31, 2026
RE: Deprecation of Legacy Auth Service
Effective April 30, 2026, the legacy OAuth 1.0 authentication service will be decommissioned. All consuming services must migrate to the OAuth 2.0 endpoint before this date. Documentation is available on the internal wiki.
Please confirm migration status with your team lead by April 15. Services still using the legacy endpoint after
April 30 will receive 401 errors.
Action required: Acknowledge receipt and confirm migration timeline.
